Compliance.description: Limited SA-specific SARS/VAT compliance; POPIA compliance unclear; US-focused, requires manual SA adjustments.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Capterra 4.4/5 (global); SA users note free tier value but compliance gaps.

Product Value.description: Free core (invoicing/accounting); paid payroll/payments R0-R500+/mo. Strong free value.

Innovation.description: AI Copilot, mobile receipts, bank connections, automated reports.

Customer Support.description: Limited free support; paid support only; mixed reviews on responsiveness.

Accessibility & Security.description: 256-bit SSL, bank-level security; GDPR compliant; limited POPIA specifics.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free core; Payments 1.4%+R5 per transaction; Payroll from ~R250/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Positive on free value globally; SA users note compliance limitations.
